'''Blackfire Flight''' was a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] that was assigned to the Fifth Battle Group during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. Part of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]], it fought in [[Operation Hammerblow]]. It was sent to attack the recon satellites orbiting the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] planet. One A-wing was destroyed by an orbital sleeper mine while making a pass on a satellite. It was the only [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] casualty in the engagement.
